roles.title: Senior Developer
roles.rawNotes:
my experience in delta insurance. I am a senior .net developer. I've listed the things that I do
1. Maintaining and development an insurance platform created using .net framework, I do the development of new features and also supports the user by addressing their issues (BAUs). I do code review, scheduling of release, doing the actual release. the app is deployed in an AWS EC2 instance. the app is deployed in github (previously in svn) with ci/cd github actions
2. Maintaining and development of a new insurance platform created in .net core as a backend with multiple microservices like quote microservices, authentication microservices, broker, email, client. It has a react frontend that I also do the development and deployment. I do code review, scheduling of release, doing the actual release. the app is deployed in an AWS EC2 instance. CI/CD uses aws codepipeline, codecommit.
3. Development and testing of a new insurance platform created using claude caude that uses next.js, tailwind css3, azure msal, jest+testing library for unit tests, express 4, azure cosmos db, azure blob storage, zod for schema validation, jwt/jwks, OpenAI Sdk, pdf-lib, tsup for build, ts-node-dev for local dev. Playwright test with mcp with claude code. I do the testing, creating spec files, doing manual testing on dev, uat and prod.
4. I do the migration from svn to github setup the pipeline

bullets.text: Develop and maintain a legacy insurance platform built on .NET Framework, shipping new features while resolving user-reported BAU issues.
bullets.source: Maintaining and development an insurance platform created using .net framework, I do the development of new features and also supports the user by addressing their issues (BAUs).

bullets.text: Own the release lifecycle for a .NET Framework insurance platform — conducting code reviews, scheduling releases, and executing deployments to an AWS EC2 instance.
bullets.source: I do code review, scheduling of release, doing the actual release. the app is deployed in an AWS EC2 instance.

bullets.text: Manage GitHub-based source control and CI/CD via GitHub Actions for a legacy insurance platform migrated from SVN.
bullets.source: the app is deployed in github (previously in svn) with ci/cd github actions

bullets.text: Develop and maintain a new insurance platform built on a .NET Core microservices backend (quote, authentication, broker, email, and client services) paired with a React frontend, owning both frontend development and deployment.
bullets.source: Maintaining and development of a new insurance platform created in .net core as a backend with multiple microservices like quote microservices, authentication microservices, broker, email, client. It has a react frontend that I also do the development and deployment.

bullets.text: Lead code review, release scheduling, and release execution for the .NET Core microservices platform, deployed to AWS EC2 with CI/CD via AWS CodePipeline and CodeCommit.
bullets.source: I do code review, scheduling of release, doing the actual release. the app is deployed in an AWS EC2 instance. CI/CD uses aws codepipeline, codecommit.

bullets.text: Develop and test a new AI-assisted insurance platform using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Azure MSAL, Express, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure Blob Storage, Zod, JWT/JWKS, the OpenAI SDK, and pdf-lib, built with Claude Code as the primary development tool.
bullets.source: Development and testing of a new insurance platform created using claude caude that uses next.js, tailwind css3, azure msal, jest+testing library for unit tests, express 4, azure cosmos db, azure blob storage, zod for schema validation, jwt/jwks, OpenAI Sdk, pdf-lib, tsup for build, ts-node-dev for local dev.

bullets.text: Author automated test coverage with Jest and Testing Library plus Playwright end-to-end tests (via MCP integration with Claude Code), and perform manual testing across dev, UAT, and production environments.
bullets.source: Playwright test with mcp with claude code. I do the testing, creating spec files, doing manual testing on dev, uat and prod.

bullets.text: Migrate legacy codebase repositories from SVN to GitHub and set up the CI/CD pipeline for the new workflow.
bullets.source: I do the migration from svn to github setup the pipeline
